annual_rate.notes: Kansas general/contract prejudgment interest is 10% fixed (K.S.A. 16-201(a)). For civil TORT actions filed on or after July 1, 2023, prejudgment interest is instead two percentage points below the K.S.A. 16-204(e)(1) judgment rate — currently 5.75% (7.75% − 2 for July 1, 2026–June 30, 2027), variable, recomputed each July 1 (K.S.A. 16-201(b)). Verified 2026-07-18. Not legal advice.
